name: Hot Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the artichoke hearts, Parmesan cheese, mayonnaise, and garlic until well combined.
2. Transfer the mixture into a 9-inch quiche dish.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
4. Sprinkle with chopped tomatoes and chives.
5. Serve with crackers.
